comment: Hardware ABI probe. Reads ctx[Slot] as a raw 32-bit word and uses Bit to pan/weight the input signal left or right. No generated oscillator, no fardata, no dereference of the selected ctx word.

params.name: Slot
params.comment: ctx[] index to inspect. The selected word is read but not dereferenced.

params.name: Bit
params.comment: Bit index inside the selected 32-bit ctx word.
